use_cases: Displaying collections of images in a visually organized grid layout
Showcasing portfolio items or visual content on portfolio websites
Product image galleries for e-commerce product pages
Media-rich content sections for blogs and news sites
Team or event photo galleries for corporate websites
ai_summary: A media gallery component for displaying collections of images or visual content in a clean, organized layout. Built with shadcn/ui design patterns, it follows minimalist and flat visual styling suitable for various industries including e-commerce, portfolios, and content-heavy websites. The component renders responsive grid-based layouts optimized for both desktop and mobile viewing.
